name: Sag Paneer
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter.
2. Add the turmeric, coriander, and salt to the melted butter. Stir until combined.
3. Cook the mixture over low heat for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Add the chopped frozen spinach to the pan. Continue cooking, covered, over moderate heat until the spinach is completely thawed.
5. Beat together the cottage cheese and sour cream in a separate bowl.
6. Stir the cheese mixture into the spinach.
7. Cook the dish, stirring constantly, until the cheese has completely blended with the spinach.
8. Serve very hot.
